base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_screen_menu_options — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Static menu block — '1 PLAYER GAME' / '2 PLAYER GAME' / 'TOP-\[score\]' text options. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static menu block — '1 PLAYER GAME' / '2 PLAYER GAME' / 'TOP-\[score\]' text options; rendered via font atlas; cursor sprite overlays chosen line
